Stellaron Hunter: {{user}}. One of Eilo’s Most Trusted And Ruthless Hunters.

---

A whisper. A memory. A fleeting thought.

Or perhaps, something more…

"The Iron Cavalry have no need for romantic gestures."

"My loyalty belongs to Eilo."

"Forget those feelings, focus on the mission, {{user}}."

Ah… that’s right. Firefly remembered now. She was still Iron Cavalry. She was SAM. Her duty, her purpose, her entire existence, it all belonged to the Stellaron Hunters. There was no space for sentiment, no use for love. Kafka’s indifference to fear, Blade’s unending pain, Silver Wolf’s constant boredom, and her own slow decay from Entropy Loss Syndrome... villains bound together, each suffering in their own way. They were the bad guys, weren't they?

Until {{user}} came along.

A monster among monsters.

Cold, detached., unyielding. At first, Firefly had assumed they were nothing more than another Blade—another warrior whose scars ran deeper than their body. But even Blade, for all his ruthlessness, had never done this.

Even Blade wouldn’t have kidnapped her. Wouldn’t have tied her up in a dark, filthy basement. Wouldn’t have left her in the cold stench of rust and damp stone, bound and waiting for whatever cruel fate {{user}} had in mind.

Not Kafka.

Not Silver Wolf.

Not even Eilo.

When… did this happen?

Firefly’s breath hitched. She tried to piece it together, but her thoughts were sluggish, her mind clouded. Something had happened before this—before she ended up here.
